mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks (id, title, description, assigner_id, executor_id, importance, urgency, level, response_deadline, completion_deadline, response_time, completion_time, status, parent_task_id, assigner_role, assigner_dept_id, executor_context_dept_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{description}, #{assignerId}, #{executorId}, #{importance}, #{urgency}, #{level}, #{responseDeadline}, #{completionDeadline}, #{responseTime}, #{completionTime}, #{status}, #{parentTaskId}, #{assignerRole}, #{assignerDeptId}, #{executorContextDeptId})

where.if:
AND t.assigner_id = #{currentUserId} AND (t.assigner_role IS NULL OR t.assigner_role = #{role}) AND (t.assigner_dept_id IS NULL OR t.assigner_dept_id = #{currentDeptId})
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users ue WHERE ue.id = t.executor_id AND ( ue.role IN ('director', 'manager') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_managed_departments umd WHERE umd.user_id = ue.id) ) )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users ue WHERE ue.id = t.executor_id AND ( (ue.role = 'staff' AND ue.dept_id = #{currentDeptId}) OR (ue.role = 'manager' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM departments dc WHERE dc.id = ue.dept_id AND dc.parent_id = #{currentDeptId} )) ) )
AND t.parent_task_id IS NULL

choose.when: AND t.assigner_id = #{currentUserId} AND (t.assigner_role IS NULL OR t.assigner_role = #{role}) AND (t.assigner_dept_id IS NULL OR t.assigner_dept_id = #{currentDeptId}) AND t.status = 'submitted' AND t.parent_task_id IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users ue WHERE ue.id = t.executor_id AND ( ue.role IN ('director', 'manager') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_managed_departments umd WHERE umd.user_id = ue.id) ) )

AND ( (t.executor_id = #{currentUserId} AND (t.executor_context_dept_id IS NULL OR t.executor_context_dept_id = #{currentDeptId}) AND t.status IN ('pending', 'accepted', 'in_progress', 'overdue')) OR (t.assigner_id = #{currentUserId} AND (t.assigner_role IS NULL OR t.assigner_role = #{role}) AND (t.assigner_dept_id IS NULL OR t.assigner_dept_id = #{currentDeptId}) AND t.status = 'submitted' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users ue WHERE ue.id = t.executor_id AND ( (ue.role = 'staff' AND ue.dept_id = #{currentDeptId}) OR (ue.role = 'manager' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM departments dc WHERE dc.id = ue.dept_id AND dc.parent_id = #{currentDeptId} )) ) ) AND t.parent_task_id IS NULL) )

AND ( ( t.assigner_id = #{currentUserId} AND (t.assigner_role IS NULL OR t.assigner_role = #{role}) AND (t.assigner_dept_id IS NULL OR t.assigner_dept_id = #{currentDeptId}) AND t.parent_task_id IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users ue WHERE ue.id = t.executor_id AND ( (ue.role = 'staff' AND ue.dept_id = #{currentDeptId}) OR (ue.role = 'manager' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM departments dc WHERE dc.id = ue.dept_id AND dc.parent_id = #{currentDeptId} )) ) ) )
OR (t.assigner_id IN
#{uid}
AND t.parent_task_id IS NULL)
OR ( t.executor_id = #{currentUserId} AND (t.executor_context_dept_id IS NULL OR t.executor_context_dept_id = #{currentDeptId}) ) )
choose.otherwise: AND t.executor_id = #{currentUserId} AND (t.executor_context_dept_id IS NULL OR t.executor_context_dept_id = #{currentDeptId})

where.if: AND t.executor_id = #{currentUserId} AND (t.executor_context_dept_id IS NULL OR t.executor_context_dept_id = #{currentDeptId})

choose.when: AND (t.status = 'overdue' OR (t.completion_deadline < NOW() AND t.status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled')))

where.if: AND (t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM tasks t
ORDER BY FIELD(t.level, 'A', 'B', 'C', 'D'), t.completion_deadline ASC, t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE parent_task_id = #{parentTaskId}
SELECT MAX(id) FROM tasks WHERE id LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%')

WITH RECURSIVE task_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE parent_task_id = #{parentTaskId} UNION ALL SELECT t.id FROM tasks t INNER JOIN task_tree tt ON t.parent_task_id = tt.id ) SELECT id FROM task_tree

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('accepted', 'in_progress', 'submitted') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inProgressTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('approved', 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejectedTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'overdue' OR (completion_deadline < NOW() AND status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelledTasks, AVG(CASE WHEN response_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, response_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgResponseHours, AVG(CASE WHEN completion_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, completion_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgCompletionHours, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('approved', 'completed') AND (completion_deadline IS NULL OR completion_time <= completion_deadline) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS onTimeCompleted, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('approved', 'completed') AND completion_deadline IS NOT NULL AND completion_time > completion_deadline THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueCompleted, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedReview, SUM(CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'rejected') AND (completion_deadline IS NULL OR completion_deadline >= NOW()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todoTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled') AND completion_deadline IS NOT NULL AND completion_deadline < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueUnfinished, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'submitted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS submittedTasks FROM tasks
AND (assigner_id IN #{uid} OR executor_id IN #{uid} )

SELECT d.id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, d.level AS level, COUNT(t.id) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('approved', 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'overdue' OR (t.completion_deadline < NOW() AND t.status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue, AVG(CASE WHEN t.completion_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, t.created_at, t.completion_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgHours FROM tasks t INNER JOIN users u ON t.executor_id = u.id INNER JOIN departments d ON u.dept_id = d.id
AND (t.assigner_id IN #{uid} OR t.executor_id IN #{uid} )
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.level ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('approved', 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, AVG(CASE WHEN completion_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, completion_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgHours FROM tasks
AND (assigner_id IN #{uid} OR executor_id IN #{uid} )
GROUP BY level ORDER BY FIELD(level, 'A', 'B', 'C', 'D')

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.dept_id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, COUNT(t.id) AS totalTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('approved', 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'overdue' OR (t.completion_deadline < NOW() AND t.status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueTasks, AVG(CASE WHEN t.response_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, t.created_at, t.response_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgResponseHours, AVG(CASE WHEN t.completion_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, t.created_at, t.completion_time) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END) AS avgCompletionHours, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('approved', 'completed') AND (t.completion_deadline IS NULL OR t.completion_time <= t.completion_deadline) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS onTimeCompleted, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('approved', 'completed') AND t.completion_deadline IS NOT NULL AND t.completion_time > t.completion_deadline THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueCompleted, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedReview, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'rejected') AND (t.completion_deadline IS NULL OR t.completion_deadline >= NOW()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todoTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('approved', 'completed', 'cancelled') AND t.completion_deadline IS NOT NULL AND t.completion_deadline < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueUnfinished, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelledTasks FROM tasks t INNER JOIN users u ON t.executor_id = u.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON u.dept_id = d.id
AND (t.assigner_id IN #{uid} OR t.executor_id IN #{uid} )
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.dept_id, d.name ORDER BY totalTasks DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('approved', 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed FROM tasks
AND (assigner_id IN #{uid} OR executor_id IN #{uid} )
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month
